title: The Creepy Art of Hideaki Anno Some disturbing similarities I found between Evangelion and Shin Godzilla

[]: Re: The Creepy Art of Hideaki Anno: Some disturbing similarities I found between Evangelion and Shin Godzilla.             Quote Post by dzzthink » Fri Mar 04, 2022 3:39 pm wow, this is pretty good. Makes me want to actually get invested in this Shin franchise went things start getting ahead, due to the similarities.

[]: Re: The Creepy Art of Hideaki Anno: Some disturbing similarities I found between Evangelion and Shin Godzilla.             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Sat Mar 05, 2022 8:59 am @ dzzthink if you interested I have edited my previous post adding to it some others similarities I have found. I dunno about what kind of creepy beings Anno will may creating in future. For now I hope that the Shin Japan Heroes Universe will give more stuff like the Evangelion Unit 01 G Awakening, perhaps something like a hybrid King Ghidorah/Angel and more stuff like that.

[]: Re: The Creepy Art of Hideaki Anno: Some disturbing similarities I found between Evangelion and Shin Godzilla.             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Mar 09, 2022 12:23 pm Hideaki Anno and Mahiro Maeda going crazy with the ghastly creature designs is always wonderful to see.
